scripts.db:seed: docker exec -i brixit-postgres psql -U brixit -d brixit < prisma/seed.sql
scripts.db:data: docker exec -i brixit-postgres psql -U brixit -d brixit < prisma/data.sql
scripts.kill-port: powershell -Command "$p = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $env:PORT -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -First 1; if ($p) { Stop-Process -Id $p -Force; Write-Host 'Killed PID' $p } else { Write-Host 'Port is already free' }"
